ocr.text: In the fiscal year 2024, Revolut demonstrated significant financial performance with a Revenue(GBP) of $150M, a
NetIncome(GBP) of $30M, and OperatingExpenses(GBP) totaling $20M, alongside a LoanDisbursement(GBP) amounting to
$1.2B. The RevenueGrowth(%) was recorded at 15%, with a NetIncomeGrowth(%) of 20%, resulting in an
OperatingMargin(%) of 25% and a LoanGrowth(%) of 30%.

CustomerMetrics reported a total of 500K NewCustomers and 2M ActiveUsers, reflecting a ChurnRate(%) of 5% and a
CustomerSatisfaction(%) rate of 85%. OperationalMetrics indicated an impressive LoanApprovalRate(%) of 80%, with an
AverageLoanSize(GBP) of 3,000, a DefaultRate(%) of 2%, and a CostperAcquisition(GBP) set at 50. The MarketPosition of
Revolut is notable, with a MarketShare(%) of 15% and a CompetitiveRanking of 3. These metrics collectively underscore
Revolut's robust growth trajectory and strong market presence within the fintech and digital payments landscape, highlighting
its effective customer acquisition strategies and operational efficiencies that are critical in a competitive environment. The
comprehensive data reflects a strategic alignment with growth objectives and underscores the platform's commitment to
enhancing customer satisfaction while maintaining healthy financial indicators.
